author.bio: Enjoy Linux & Unix-like systems? Open source software and programming? Sysadmin & DevOps work? Follow us to make the most of sysadmin-hood.
author.name: The Best Linux Blog In the Unixverse

content.text:
I saw a developer today.

No company swag hoodie.
No stickers on their laptop.
No mechanical keyboard.
No Windows or macOS.

He just sat there.
Typing away in vim IDE running on Arch Linux and older ThinkPad.
Like a psychopath.
